title: A Day in the Muzik Forest
overview: In the vibrant and unique Muzik Forest, a place where animals with distinct personalities live, Toffee and the friends spend another carefree day enjoying their freedom.

title: Walking Watermelon?
overview: Toffee comes across a walking watermelon while taking a walk.

title: All Good Today!
overview: While taking a walk with Willy, Toffee happens to encounter Teeffee who guards the safety of Muzik Forest.

title: Porumee's New Menu
overview: As always, Porumee is putting in effort to create a new recipe for bread. Toffee and the friends visit Porumee's store and curiously taste the new bread.

title: Let's Play at the Beach!
overview: Toffee spends some relaxed time, watching Taffee play in the sand at the beach.

title: Teeffee is a Guardian of Sea?!
overview: Toffee and Willy are enjoying fishing. Is Teeffee protecting the waterfront?

title: A Blacksmith, Kumee
overview: Kumee who is skilled at crafting various items, is making something as usual.

title: Here Comes Soapy!
overview: A cloud of cotton is falling from the sky…

title: Look at me, Toffee!
overview: Soapy is seeking attention from Toffee, but Toffeee is glued to the computer...

title: Toffee's Market of Wonders
overview: Toffee and Willy set up a small flea market to sell their unusual finds from the lake.

title: Let's Make a Parfait!
overview: Toffee and the friends spot a delicious-looking parfait and are eager to learn how to make it. Porumee decides to host a parfait making class for them!

title: Not easy being an art model
overview: Toffee becomes an art model for Taffee's drawing, but staying still is too boring for Toffee..

title: Mint Chocolate Chip is the Best!
overview: Toffee has an undeniable love for mint chocolate chip. Are you also a mint chocolate chip lover?

title: The Secret of the Superstar: Part 1
overview: One day, all friends gather around to watch an advertisement featuring the superstar Saja. Toffee, captivated by the ad, decides to head straight to get the product.

title: The Secret of the Superstar: Part 2
overview: Animals from all over the Muzik Forest begin flocking to the Porumee's store, where the Saja's product is being sold, to get their hands on the product.

title: Smells Like Strawberry!
overview: A sweet, enticing scent of strawberries flows by the wind, and Toffee is drawn by the scent.

title: The Gift from the Moon: Part 1
overview: One night, a red moon rises in the sky, casting a mysterious, fiery light that descends upon the earth…

title: The Gift from the Moon: Part 2
overview: As the light touches the ground, enormous strawberries begin to appear, filling the Muzik Forest with their sweet scent. Drawn by the irresistible aroma, the forest animals start devouring the strawberries..

title: Moonlit Feast
overview: Tonight, the Muzik Forest animals gather together for a special moon-watching celebration. Under the soft glow of the moonlight, they raise their glasses in a joyful toast, savoring the moment and each other's company.

title: The Sweet Scent of Happiness
overview: With sparkling eyes full of curiosity, Toffee, Teeffee, and Taffee spot something in the distance. A sweet, irresistible aroma drifts through the air, and they are drawn by its enchantment.

title: Unexpected Rainy Walk
overview: Toffee enjoys taking in the sights and sounds of nature, but suddenly, dark clouds roll in and a heavy rain begins to pour down.

title: Unexpected Encounter: Part 1
overview: At the lake where curious things are caught every time, Toffee and Willy enjoy fishing while rolling around.

title: Unexpected Encounter: Part 2
overview: Toffee gets bored of fishing and decideds to go for a swim. After a refreshing swim, Toffee climbs onto a small island to rest, only to discover that the island is moving…

title: Snowy Muzik Forest
overview: In a serene forest blanketed by thick snow, Toffee and the friends come together to build an igloo.

title: Escape from the Heat
overview: On a scorching hot day, Toffee and Willy discover something in Kumee's shop and find a way to escape the heat.

title: Frozen Muzik Forest: Part 1
overview: One night, a red moon rises in the sky and something sparkles as it falls from the moon.

title: Frozen Muzik Forest: Part 2
overview: As the Muzik Forest turns into a world of ice with the massive refrigerators, the animal friends excitedly enjoy the frozen world.

title: Want to Be Like Saja / Wearing the Saja's Mane
overview: Saja is the most admired character in the Muzik Forest, and Toffee tries to resemble in its own way.
